title: Modulo_C_ERPI_Legal
description: Capítulo IV, Sección I, Apartado C — Lineamientos EFICINE Producción enero 2026. PASS/FAIL. Covers: prior EFICINE status, copyright/INDAUTOR, good practices commitments, public data sheet. Missing ANY element = not evaluated.

c0_erpi_elegibilidad.description: Pre-check: ERPI must meet eligibility criteria BEFORE submitting.

proyectos_autorizados_no_exhibidos.description: ERPI + partners cannot have 2+ authorized EFICINE projects that haven't been exhibited yet. If >=2 → INELIGIBLE.

solicitudes_este_periodo.description: Cannot submit more than 3 applications in the same period.

intentos_previos_este_proyecto.description: A project can be registered up to 3 times (for rejection or non-susceptible). 4th attempt = invalid. NOTE: not receiving funds due to cap exhaustion does NOT count as an attempt.

c1_estatus_proyectos_formato_4.description: FORMATO 4. Declaration of prior EFICINE/IMCINE project status. Required if ERPI or partners have any prior authorized project.

al_corriente_obligaciones.description: If has prior projects: MUST be current on ALL obligations (bank data, transfer receipts, semestral reports, completion report, CPA report, exhibition report, updated ruta crítica). If false → CANNOT participate.

al_corriente_imcine.description: If benefited by IMCINE programs: no delays, no contractual/legal/administrative non-compliance.

c2_derechos_autor_guion.description: Copyright chain and screenwriter payment. This is where most rejections happen due to calculation errors.

titulo_registrado.description: MUST match project title in SHCP system and ALL other documents. Any mismatch = rejection.

es_registro_extranjero.description: If registered abroad, certificate from equivalent institution is accepted.

c2b_contrato_cesion_derechos_patrimonial.description: Contract transferring patrimonial rights to ERPI, registered at INDAUTOR.

monto_total_guion_con_iva.description: THE 3% RULE: Must be >= 3% of total project cost (IVA included). This 3% is ONLY for final screenplay authorship. Cannot include: adaptation rights, script doctor, consultants, translations, readings, or similar services.

costo_total_proyecto_para_calculo.description: The total project cost used as base for the 3% calculation.

minimo_3_porciento_mxn.description: Calculated: costo_total_proyecto * 0.03. The Lineamientos allow a cap: 3% of the average EFICINE project cost from the prior year (published annually by IMCINE).

cumple_regla_3_porciento.description: VALIDATION: monto_total_guion_con_iva >= minimo_3_porciento_mxn. If false → FATAL ERROR.

es_obra_por_encargo.description: If true: producer commissioned the script. Different rules apply — must use adelanto (advance), NOT profit participation.

tipo_comprobante_pago.description: Option A: 10% advance of total screenplay cost, proven with CFDI + bank transfer. Option B: 10% profit participation in patrimonial rights, established in the INDAUTOR-registered contract (or in co-production contract for international co-prods). IMPORTANT: If obra por encargo, ONLY option A is valid — option B is not available.

monto_comprobante_mxn.description: For option A: must be >= 10% of total screenplay cost.

certificado_indautor_del_contrato.description: The cesión contract itself must be registered at INDAUTOR.

monto_coincide_presupuesto.description: CROSS-CHECK: The screenplay fee in this contract must match the budget line item, the flujo de efectivo, and (if applicable) the esquema financiero.

c2c_cadena_cesiones_formato_5.description: FORMATO 5. Required ONLY if rights passed through intermediaries before reaching the ERPI.

c2d_cesion_obra_semejante.description: Required ONLY if the screenplay is adapted from another work (novel, play, TV show, film, etc.).

cadena_cesiones_obra_original.description: If rights passed through intermediaries, FORMATO 5 needed for the original work too.

contrato_registrado_indautor.description: Must establish ERPI has authorization to use and exploit the work, granted by coproducer.

c2g_obra_por_encargo_adaptacion_version.description: Alternative: single INDAUTOR certificate covering both script registration and rights transfer to ERPI, citing applicable national copyright law.

c3a_buenas_practicas_formato_6.description: FORMATO 6. Commitment letter for good practices in film production. MANDATORY.

c3b_pics_formato_7.description: FORMATO 7. Commitment to participate in IMCINE's Cultural and Social Interaction Program. MANDATORY.

c4_ficha_tecnica_formato_8.description: FORMATO 8. Public-facing data sheet for the SHCP contributor platform. AUTO-POPULATE from other modules to avoid transcription errors.
